The '''Mk 45 Protective Vest''', or '''Koromondain Half-Vest''', was a type of [[Blast vest/Legends|protective vest]] that was manufactured and sold by [[Koromondain PDS, Incorporated]]. The vest was commonly referred to as "[[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] insurance," because it was specifically designed to protect the wearer from sudden attacks originating from unexpected quarters. It offered near-perfect protection against [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] and [[Slugthrower/Legends|slugthrowers]], however this was only from direct shots. Anything that impacted the vest at an angle other than straight-on would penetrate the vest. A Mk 45 Protective Vest typically cost two hundred fifty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].
